entry.title: BOs get locked by custom Action in OWL
entry.content:
We have the requirement to have a button that get a sum of the total net amount for selected customerQuotes / salesOrders in the OWL.

We implemented a custom absl BO Action in mass mode that calculates the sum and displays it in an information message. This is working prefectly fine.

The problem is, that the BOs we selected for which the action is called are getting locked in this process. As long as the user stays on the OWL the orders remain locked by the system. Because this is a mass operation we cannot accept that the orders get locked, so others cannot change them. We just need a simple "read only" action. But I cannot find any solution for this. I had the idea to use an Action Validation, but this is not available for my custom Action.

Does anybody have an idea?

entry.title: Re: SAP PP PI- MES Integration using XI
entry.content: Hallo, I have been also searching for the solution regarding this topic of SAP-PCS integration with AVEVA MES. If anybody can help

entry.title: Re: ​Schedule of Analysis for Office workbook in SAC is s...
entry.content: Absolutely, please email me at agolding@apos.com and I can send you some information on the software.

entry.title: Re: F4 Help in Custom Analytic Query
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake, I think it is not related to text association because I removed text association and it is still working. my simple requirement is to show CEPC-NAME1 or CEPC-NAME2 as value help in other CDS.  one thing I noticed is BUKRS as MATNR in your example has value table but NAME1 does not have any value table? I am not sure though will it have any implication? 

Can you please share your observations

entry.title: Re: Configuration of JDBC adapter to poll data from Database in Cloud Integration(CPI)
entry.content:
Hi Pierre, 

I am facing the same issue. Were you able to solve the problem?

Best Regards,

Amir

entry.title: Re: Audit question - Moving Average Unit Cost - How to se...
entry.content:
Hi KateL,

Yes, you are correct. The moving average you find is just a calculated value from the total inventory value divided by quantity. The important value is always the total stock.

For this topic, I recommend you check OSS note 518485 - FAQ: Valuation of goods movements - SAP for Me , namely question 4:

The moving average price is the sum of the values posted to the material (material documents, invoices, price changes) divided by the stock.

The other questions may be a good reference for you as well.

I hope it helps.

BR,

Filipe

entry.title: Re: DMS DC20 data carrier
entry.content: hi, I face the same issue with DC20. I believe the value DATA CARRIER TYPE = DE (greyed out) is an issue - cause it should be PC

entry.content:
hi, I face the same issue with DC20. I believe the value DATA CARRIER TYPE = DE (greyed out) is an issue - cause it should be PC instead.

Here is the error.

Good source is (51) Attachment Service in Handling Unit in SAP EWM | LinkedIn

still, I am stuck here

entry.title: Re: Control During data load via GRDC
entry.content: Try to check via document type, text and timestamp.

entry.title: openSAP has moved: Find over 100 former openSAP courses on the SAP Learning site
entry.content:
To bring all learning into one place and make it easy for you to find what you need, openSAP has been integrated into the SAP Learning site. Over 100 former openSAP courses are now available there for you to stay up-to-date with the latest technologies and learn in our own time.

The openSAP platform will be discontinued at the end of July 2024. If you learned with openSAP before, please don’t forget to download and save your documents (records of achievement, confirmations of participation, and digital badges), as they will no longer be accessible once the platform is discontinued.

Moving forward, the SAP Learning site will be the single destination for all your learning needs. You’ll find free, self-paced learning journeys and courses that enable you to quickly upskill in key cloud and technology solution areas and prepare for certification exams. For a deeper upskilling, the site also offers you guided premium learning resources like live sessions, practice systems, and certification attempts that you can access with an SAP Learning Hub subscription.

The podcast platform and the Microlearning offerings will remain available in their current form.

A big thanks to everyone for learning with openSAP over the years, for the great feedback you constantly shared with us, and of course for your dedication and interest in our courses.

See you on the SAP Learning site!

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Myself Vishal. I am from India and I am mainly working as a Technical Consultant on various areas like SAP Fiori, SAP ABAP, SAP BTP, CAPM.

entry.title: error " file NOT found! "when doing a test service in ui5 application in sicf
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I am having a problem with a sap ui5 fiori application.
I did a deploy-to-abap of a ui5 application in the DEV environment, then I go to the trx sicf and do a "test service" of the application and a window opens in the browser with the application.
The error occurred when I transported this application from DEV to QAS and then I went to the trx sicf and tried to do a "test service" of the application and the application opens blank in the browser with a text that says "file not found!
Do you know why this error can occur?
Or where I can see a trace of the error? I already tried from the trx /iwfnd/error_log and nothing appears.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Currency Setup
entry.content:
Dear Ajeet, @Ajeet 

Thanks for the detail information in your blog. I am now working on release 2023. The initial setup of our system is kind of different from what you have for the Currency Type 30 Group Currency.

Our initial setting is that Company Code Specific Conversion check box is <blank> as seen in the below picture.

However, once I tried to check that box to be "Company Code Specific Conversion" as in your case. SAP warns us not to do that as in the below picture. I am confused. What should be the right option?

 

We put currency Type 30 Group Currency in Controlling Area. Then, the Global Curr. Type is appeared in our company code automatically as show below.

Kindly advice.

Best Regards,

Weerakhan T.

RISE with SAP

SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: GUI Z Report in Fiori launch pad
entry.content:
Hi All, 

In S4HANA 2020 there is a Z Report working fine in GUI, it is possible to view the same in the Fiori launch pad as a Tile or App. 

Regards

entry.title: Re: error " file NOT found! "when doing a test service in ui5 application in sicf
entry.content: Have you activated the SICF node after import of your transport?

entry.title: Re: I need to find a demo on content discovery
entry.content: You can follow the path indicated below to access tutorials: Sap for Me > Best Practices > Search for scope item J54 > Accelerators > End-User Information > Task Tutorials > "Approving Purchase Order" You can follow this path to search for other scope items and their tutorials as well. I hope it helps you. Have a good day.

entry.title: Re: GUI Z Report in Fiori launch pad
entry.content: Yes, the appropriate catalog configuration needs to be maintained for it to be available in the launchpad.

entry.title: Using Outbound Service of another Software Component in BTP
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

We are developing Apps/Services on the BTP in the ABAP Environment. Every service has it's own software component. Different services need the same data (e.g. Business Partner Masterdata) from S4 Systems. To access this data, we created service consumption models and outbound services. As we don't want to create the same service consumption model and outbound service for every App, we want to outsource this coding/artefacts into another "general data connection" software component that every app has access to.

Unfortunately, I cannot access the artifacts of the "general data connection" swc from another swc.

Is there a way, I can access/reuse this data/artifacts so I don't have to recreate it for every App?

Thanks and best regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello Community. This is Yulia. Originally from Ukraine, and currently living in Spain 👋

entry.title: Re: Patch 2402 and 2402 HF1 cause crash in 'Item Master D...
entry.content:
A few days ago we installed FP2405.

I could not find the bug in the release notes, but the issue has been resolved.

So anybody that is experiencing this crash, it is not caused by add-ons or any other external causes, but by some bug in SAP B1. FP2405 resolves the crash.

entry.title: Re: Can you remember the first time you heard of SAP
entry.content: The first time I heard about SAP was during my interview for a Talent Acquisition Specialist position with a company actively seeking SAP consultants. This introduction sparked my interest and prompted me to delve deeper into SAP, specifically SuccessFactors, paving the way for my journey into consultancy.

entry.title: Re: Automate Firefighter owners and controller review
entry.content: Our situation is similar, We are required to have the FF ID Owners perform a review of the FF ID User assignments to see if they are still necessary,twice a year.  Right now we are not required to review the roles assignments on the FF IDs (External Auditor isn't requiring that...yet).  We perform this review manually, which is a pain in the rump, and have missed some of the responses, which has required us to perform the review all over again, because the review was considered deficient, per External Auditor.  We would like to figure out a way to perform this review automated.  Has anyone done anything similar?

entry.title: DELETE_ENTITY calling GET_ENTITYSET in MDK?
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working on an MDK application and trying to delete an item from an object table. However it appears as though a GET_ENTITYSET method is being called? Is this standard?


Currently GET method is not implemented on this entity set. Is that a requirement in order to run a DELETE method?

I'm fairly new to the MDK so any help would be much appreciated. Thank you!

SAP Mobile Services SAP Mobile Platform mobile development kit client

entry.title: Monitoring purchase order with status error
entry.content: How to setup monitoring for Purchase order with status as error.

entry.title: WBS Element field in API_PROJECTDEMAND_0001
entry.content:
How to assign the WBS element when creating a project demand using API_PROJECTDEMAND_0001?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: WBS Element field in API_PROJECTDEMAND_0001
entry.content:
Field ReferencedObjectUUID can be used as detailed in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/988903b47d7040f6ac4ec02e44bb58e4/2f37a96697094a06b093d024d46df7f5.html

To assign a demand to the project definition or a WBS element of an enterprise project or to a work package of a professional services project, provide the corresponding project element UUID. You can retrieve the project element UUID using entity Project Element of the Enterprise Project API.

entry.title: Re: User management in Add on empty of content
entry.content:
Hi gonzalogomez,

This issue might occur because some users have changed the user grid layout on Add-On Administration window.

On this Window, it looks like that no data is loaded in Users grid. However, user data is fully loaded but just with some display issues. When you click on the right-up arrow on the grid, you will see a larger grid window with three columns "Users", "User Code" and "User Name". You can see there that full user data is loaded but with empty first column and you can drag the column line to change the column width.

First column "Users" is supposed to be invisible by default, however for some reasons it was dragged to larger width which exceeds the width of normal grid window.

To resolve this issue, just click on the right-up arrow on Users grid and drag the first column "Users" width to 0, close form and then close SAP Business One client. Next time you login to SAP Business One client, the issue will no longer exist.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: BOBJ 4.3 AD group removed as mapped AD group AD update fails, cannot find group; what is root cause?
entry.content: In BIPlatform 4.3 after obsolete AD groups are removed from CMC: Authentication: Windows AD: Mapped AD Member Groups, Windows Active Directory update fails with Invalid group name, cannot find group (S-1-5-...), (S-1-5-...), (S-1-5-...), what is the root cause.

entry.title: Re: content type 'BMP' is incompatible with image content
entry.content:
Form -> Context

Select your GRAPHIC image and click on Properties.

Change the "MIME Type" property to 'image/bmp' or 'image/jpg' in lowercase.

entry.title: Re: Financial Accounting Certification Options - Please c...
entry.content: Thank you Margit!

entry.title: Re: Success Factors Mobile App
entry.content: Benita- this functionality isn't supported on the native mobile apps today, we display only the History that's already recorded to LMS, whether you're using the new experience or legacy home page. We do have it on our long-term roadmap, and in the meantime, adding items via mobile browser might be an option for your organization.

entry.title: Report on workflow for group journals
entry.content:
We have implement the workflow for group journals and it works fine in the proces of creating new journals. However, we would like to have a report over all journals as in: Who created them and who approved them? Is such a report available?

 

Kind regards, 

Robert Jan

entry.title: How to get rid of double tooltips on sALV column header?
entry.content:
Hi guys,

How do I get rid of double tooltips (mouseover texts) on sALV column headers?

What I noticed is that if a column is wide enough, it has a normal tooltip (only one text appears, which seems to be my custom text that I explicitly define via set_long_text method on the column). The same happens if I just manually resize column width to make it wide enough. But I want this tooltip to appear only once regardless of column width. Is this possible?

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Bom dia!

Estamos utilizando o SAP ECC 6.06 e gostaria de saber se ao aplicarmos esta NT o SAP não mais excluirá o valor do ICMS desonerado do TOTAL da NF quando informado 0(zero) no campo INDDEDUZDESON?

Caso negativo, como faço para informar o valor do ICMS desonerado sem que o mesmo toque o valor total da NF?

Gratidão

Lidia

entry.title: Fiori check the odata entity/entity set
entry.content:
How to check or where can I find the odata entity/entity set from fiori app?

i checked the Inspect->Network tab and found a $batch and saw this URL in payload 
https://sample.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZTEST_SRV/$batch?sap-client=100

but i can't see the entity set used or if its using other DPC extension 

after clicking the button there should be an entity set like CREATE_ENTITYSET, CREATE_DEEP_ENTITYSET, etc?

entry.title: SAP ByD: Is it possible to do budget reporting without scoping Active Budget Control?
entry.content:
Hello,

Our objective is to generate financial reports from ByDesign that shows a comparison of actual amounts to budgeted amounts for specific expense/revenue headings.

We do not want to implement active budget control which does the budget check for each transaction. Instead we only need the actual to budget comparisons for reporting purposes only.

All SAP ByD Help documentation that I came across refer to Active Budget Control and Budget Checks. 

Are the following possible in ByD?
1) Upload financial budget data only without active budget control
2) Generate financial reports from ByD with actual data to budget data comparison

Thank you in advance,
Rami Luchmun

entry.title: Applying Schema and Extracting Each Page Individually
entry.content:
Document Information Extraction is a great tool and will really benefit the automation community.

Being in the AP Automation and PO Automation world for many years we know that customers do all types of crazy things that can mess up our automation and therefore we must design for this as much as possible.

My question / feature, is there a way that I can send for example a 3 page PDF document and get back all 3 pages with the schema applied to all 3 pages individually? I need this because I have to normalize what was sent to me. In this case a client sent 1 document and each page in the document was a single order.

I need to get back all three pages individually and then I can compare PO Numbers to ensure that all of the pages belong to the same order.

I have already tested this scenario in the system and I got back 1 result with line items from all 3 orders and header information from the second order.

Any thoughts or suggestions would be greatly appreciated as well.

entry.title: Re: Reconciliation Account Ready for Input parameter - wh...
entry.content: LINH is the solution

entry.title: Sales order Currency is different from Accounting Document
entry.content:
Hi All:

Issue: in sales order currency is USD( same as Customer) and Invoice currency is changing to CNY( company code).

SO:

After Release to Accounting(VF02), the Amt.in loc.cur. is different。

Accounting Document:

Why the difference 0.01 add to line2?

What is this logic？

Please help me

entry.title: Will the data migration from ECC to SAP S/4 Hana include the data from link tables and the AIS?
entry.content:
I'm new to SAP migration. I would like to know if we decide to use a data migration strategy such as the SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit, which uses an RFC connection to transfer data directly from SAP ECC 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA. Is the data migration from ECC 6.0 to SAP S/4 Hana taking into account link tables like ADMI_FILES and indexed data from the archive information structure?

Thanks

entry.title: Integration of SAP PI-PP or SAP PI-PCS with Aveva MES
entry.content:
Hi Team,


I just have a quick question, is there any possibility to communicate SAP- PI-PCS with Aveva MES system for the process industry. I want to transfer the manufacturing process values and parameters in addition wants to transfer plant data, production process quality management, order tracking etc from SAP to MES.

I know there is SAP PP module and it has SAP PP-PCS interface to link with the external 3rd parties software. Can anyone help me to figure out the way how can I connect or integrate the SAP PP-PI with Aveva MES.

Any input would be appreciated.

Thanks & Best Regards

SSamber

entry.title: Re: How to get rid of double tooltips on sALV column header?
entry.content: Did you try to use an explicit call of method CL_SALV_COLUMN->SET_TOOLTIP ?

entry.title: ADIPEC
entry.content:
ADIPEC is the largest energy event in the world, attracting industry leaders, experts, and professionals from around the globe. Hosted by ADNOC, this event serves as an ideal platform for networking, showcasing innovations, and developing business opportunities in the industry.

ADIPEC 2024 aims to accelerate efforts towards decarbonization and foster innovation to propel the global energy transition forward.

Join us from November 4th to 7th at the Abu Dhabi National Exhibition Centre for an incredible showcase of innovation and sustainability!

entry.title: Looking to create a condition in the contract request approval flow
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone confirm if there is a way to create a condition in the contract request approval flow that would utilize the amendment type selection in the contract workspace, specifically "Renewal".

entry.title: how to use combined determinations ?! #ABAP RAP#
entry.content:
Hey, 

I am currenty trying to convert the currency of an amount of a travel entity once the user changes the fields BookingFee and/or CurrencyCode. Therefore I have implemented the following determination: determination calculateTotalPrice on modify { field BookingFee , CurrencyCode; } in my root behaviour definition. 

The problem is that while debugging I get only the new currency code although for the used function i need both codes : the old and the new one to execute my conversion. So my solution was that i need maybe to implement two determinations the first one reads the old currency code and saves and the other to execute the conversion. Since determinations are independent, does anyone knows how can I use the result of a determination in the next one or is there any other approach that can serve? 

Best regards and thanks in advance 

sisi

entry.title: How to connect to RISE using saprouter over Azure?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently customer is using saprouter to connect to their HeadQuarter over VPN Site to Site. Customer wants to know if they will work as the same way when they migrate to Rise with S/4 Hana on Azure? Can they use Saprouter to connect to RISE over VPN S2S?

I will appreciate your comments.

entry.title: ASUG Best Practices
entry.content:
Join us in Houston from October 14–16 for ASUG Best Practices, the premier event for the SAP ecosystem.

This conference is ideal for managerial-level professionals providing customer, technical, or functional support for their SAP environment. Network with leaders from key industries like Oil, Gas, Energy, Chemicals, Mill Products, Mining, and Industrial Manufacturing. Don’t miss this chance to connect, learn, and share best practices with North America's SAP community.

entry.title: Tax Reporter Birthday format question
entry.content: I'm using P0002-GDAT to display Employee Birthdate in a custom form. It puts the date in format YYYYMMDD in the temse file and I need it to display MMDDYYYY. Is there a field conversion routine or something that I can configure?

entry.title: Re: Fiori check the odata entity/entity set
entry.content: you should filter by  "metadata" in your network tab.

entry.title: Re: Quote comparison in sap
entry.content: What is the question?

entry.title: Why and How to activate your Free SAP Build Entitlements with your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Solution
entry.content:
As I'm sure you are all aware now that the one and only SAP Build is included with your SAP S/4HANA Cloud solution at no additional cost.  SAP Build is your one stop solution for low code and pro code application development and automation. It allows you to create secure, clean-core extensions that help customize your SAP S/4HANA Cloud solution, keeping you ahead of the competition.

 If you goal is to implement a successful SAP S/4HANA Cloud transformation journey, maintaining your customization while keeping the core clean, then you've arrived to the right place.  If you want to learn more about what is included in your free extension bundle, reach out to your Account Executive to explore the details of your specific entitlements.

Now let's get started!

Below is a step-by-step guide on how to activate Build Process Automation, Build Apps, Build Code and Build Workzone from the BTP cockpit:

1- SAP Build Process Automation

Why activate?

  • Build and scale automated business process within your organization. Empower business experts to create processes, decisions, and workflows effortlessly using natural language prompts, thanks to our latest Gen AI features.
  • Get started with the largest library of SAP pre-built content, designed based on industry best practices and common automation projects.

Now that you are here, let's dive deeper into how activate?

To check the exact entitlements amount available with your SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public or private edition) head to the SAP BTP cockpit, under entitlements click on service agreements, type "SAP Build Process Automation" and review all available units and quantity. 

1. First navigate to SAP BTP Cockpit, on the left-hand side from the menu list, and click on “Boosters”.

2. Once the Boosters overview page opens, in the search field type “SAP Build Process Automation” (1) and under Set up account for SAP Build Process Automation click the “Start”(2). button.

 3. SAP Build Process Automation overview page will open up, you can then proceed forward by clicking on “Start”.

4. The booster will then automatically perform a prerequisite test to confirm the service and your credentials. Once the two green boxes show to confirm the test has been completed successfully, you can click on “Next” at the bottom of the page.  

5. On this page you can choose if you want to create a new sub-account or use an existing one. In this example we will choose “Create sub-account" scenario (1). Click on “Next” (2) to configure account.  

6. On this page you assign the quota for this sub-account. You will first delete the marked services as they are not required before you click on “Next”. 

7. On this page you can add the users who will access SAP Build Process Automation tool, administrators (standard users) and developers (advanced users).  Note that any user who will be added as a developer will automatically be added as an administrator as well, but the opposite is not true. You can always add or edit users later. Click on “Next” (3) to confirm users added. 

8. In the last step you can review the summary of your setup. Once you confirm all information is accurate, click on “Finish”.

 9. To get the service up and ready for you, the booster will then start the deployment process which can take up to 5 minutes. In the meantime, pamper yourself with a cup of coffee, you deserve a break! 

 10. Once the process is complete, a success message will pop up on the screen. Click on “Navigate to the Subaccount.” 

11. In the subaccount on the left-hand side of the menu click on “Instances and Subscriptions.”

12. You get now an overview on the activated services, and you can move directly to the application by clicking on the icon in the red box. 

13. Ladies and gentlemen, the moment you’ve been waiting for has now arrived. You made it to the lobby of the application development page within SAP Build Process Automation. You can streamline your business processes, create forms and build your automations. 

Curious to get started quickly? visit our store to browse the many pre-built content to help you save time and automate right away. Head to Store and filter by product type S/4HANA. 

2- SAP Build Apps: 
Why activate?

  • Build and extend enterprise apps for SAP S/4HANA Cloud with low-code drag-and-drop simplicity
  • Develop mobile, browser, and desktop apps rapidly, integrate with all your enterprise systems, and drive collaboration throughout your organization

How to activate?

1. First navigate to SAP BTP Cockpit, on the left-hand side from the menu list click on “Boosters”. 

2. Once the the Boosters overview page opens, in the search field type “SAP Build Apps” and under Get started with SAP Build Apps, click the “Start” button.

 3. Once the three green boxes show “Done”, that means the test has been completed successfully. Click on “Next” at the bottom of the page to proceed forward.

  4. You can choose if you want to create a new sub-account or use an existing one. In this example, we will choose the “Create subaccount" scenario. Click on “Next” to configure the account. 

 5. On this page you select the standard plan and assign the quota for this subaccount. Then click on “Next”. 

 6. You can add the users who will access SAP Build Apps, administrators, and developers.  You can always add or edit users later. Once you assign your users, click on “Next”. 

 7. In the last step you can review the summary of your setup. Once you confirm all information is accurate, click on “Finish”. 

8. To get the service up and ready for you, the booster will then start the deployment process which can take up to five minutes.  

 9. Once the process is complete, the following window will pop up. Press on “Navigate to Subaccount”. 

 10. In the subaccount on the left-hand side of the menu click on “Instances and Subscriptions”. You get now an overview of the activated services, and you can move directly to the application by clicking on the icon in the red box. 

This will take you to the solution's main lobby where you can build an enterprise application without any coding prior experience. Let the fun begin!  

3- SAP Build Code:

Why activate?

  • Rapidly extend SAP S/4HANA Cloud with pro-code application development tailored for SAP development
  • Generative AI-based code development with Joule copilot that supercharges developer productivity

How to activate?

1. First navigate to SAP BTP Cockpit, on the left-hand side from the menu list click on “Boosters”. 

2. Once the the Boosters overview page opens, in the search field type “SAP Build Code” and click the “Start” button. 

3. Once you review the overview and components click the “Start” button. 

4. Once the three green boxes show “Done”, that means the test has been completed successfully. Click on “Next” at the bottom of the page to proceed forward.

5. You can choose if you want to create a new sub-account or use an existing one. In this example, we will choose the “Create subaccount" scenario. Click on “Next” to configure the account. 

 6. On this page you select the standard plan and assign the quota for this subaccount. Then click on “Next”. 

7. You can add the users who will access SAP Build Code, administrators, and developers.  You can always add or edit users later. Once you assign your users, click on “Next”.  

 8. In the last step you can review the summary of your setup. Once you confirm all information is accurate, click on “Finish”. 

 9. To get the service up and ready for you, the booster will then start the deployment process which can take up to five minutes.  

10. Once the process is complete, the following window will pop up. Press on “Navigate to Subaccount”. 

11. In the subaccount on the left-hand side of the menu click on “Instances and Subscriptions”. You get now an overview of the activated services, and you can move directly to the application by clicking on the icon in the red box. 

This will take you to the solution's main lobby where you can build an enterprise application using pro-code tools. Let the fun begin!  

 

 

 3- SAP Build Work Zone: 

Why activate?

  • Provide centralized access to business application information on any device.
  • Maximize team productivity by enabling guided experiences and knowledge sharing.

How to activate?

If you have activated SAP Build Apps or SAP Build Process Automation, chances are you already activated SAP Build Work Zone as well. Double-check by heading to your subaccount, clicking on “Instances and Subscriptions” and confirming if Build Work Zone, standard edition is subscribed.  

 If not, follow the activation steps below:  

1. In your subaccount, navigate to “Service Marketplace”, on the left-hand side from the menu list, and in the search, enter SAP Build. Then click on “SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition”.  

 2. Under the “Applications Plans” tab, click the Actions icon “…” and select “Create” to create a new subscription. 

 3. In the New Instance or Subscription dialog box that opens, leave the basic information that appears there and click “Create”. 

 4. You’ll get confirmation that your subscription is being created. Once you confirm your subscription, double-tap on the SAP Build Work Zone to head to the application. 

The Site Directory opens. This is where you’ll create and manage your sites.

For more information on SAP Build, please refer to the following resources: 

    • Explore: SAP Build Product Page |  SAP Build Product Demo |  Help Portal 
    • Engage & stay up to date: Build activities| Build Newsletter |  Builders Community
    • Become Build Certified:  SAP Learning Journey

entry.title: Re: Field Masking **** in SAP Personas
entry.content: Any suggestions any one?

entry.title: concatenate employee names
entry.content:
Good morning community, do any of you know how I can concatenate fields that only have information? example;

First Last Name
Velez

Second Last Name
Torres

First Name
Santiago

Middle Name
Null

Third Name
Null

Currently we have this formula:

CONCAT([Person#Personal info#FirstName] , CONCAT(" " ,CONCAT([Person#Personal info#SecondName] , CONCAT(" " ,CONCAT(" " ,CONCAT([Person#Personal info#FirstName] , CONCAT(" " ,CONCAT([Person#Personal info#SecondName] , CONCAT(" " ,CONCAT([Person#Personal info#ThirdName] ," " ) ))))) )) )) ))

But when filtering some names are wrong because they only have certain fields. I would appreciate your answer on how to ignore the empty fields.

entry.title: Re: Default SAP Save Location
entry.content: hi - you have a type o in the program name.  it is RSSOPCDR.  or of course, transaction SO21.

entry.title: How many P.R document types in SAP
entry.content: How many P.R document types in SAP

entry.title: Re: Default SAP Save Location
entry.content: you have a type-o in the program name. it is actually RSSOPCDR.

entry.title: Using/Calling Fiori custom fields in MIRO (DRSEG_CI and CI_DRSEG_CUST)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Implementing BADI MRM_ITEM_CUSTFIELDS, we can able to add custom tab and populate the custom fields appended in DRSEG_CI and CI_DRSEG_CUST.  

Since we are in S4 Migration and having custom fields created by SAP which are maintained in RSEG table, we would like to use the same custom fields for this MIRO enhancement, instead of creating a new one in DRSEG_CI and CI_DRSEG_CUST as it looks a duplicate and problem in syncing the posting data i.e., updating real time live data both in the Fiori custom fields and DRSEG_CI  custom fields. 

Please let me know any suitable solution to use the Fiori custom fields that are created in RSEG table.

Thanks in advance.

Kind regards.

entry.title: RAP : Multi Level List (3 level)
entry.content:
Hi,

There seems to be no available documentation on creating Parent-Child-Subchild using the composition and parent associations. On attempting the same, although with the similar code as below, the navigation to the object page of the 3rd level entity does not work on create, and only create a row in the Child 3 level table, without any managed uuid creation or object page navigation:

 

managed;

strict ( 2 );

with draft;

 

define behavior for ZI_G_ROOT alias Root

implementation in class zbp_i_g_Root unique

persistent table ztg_Root

draft table ztg_d_Root

lock master total etag UpdatedDate

authorization master ( instance )

etag master LastLocalUpdateAt

{

create;

update;// ( precheck );

delete;

association _Parent { create; with draft; }

association _Child { with draft; }

field ( numbering : managed, readonly ) RootUuid;

 

draft action Resume;

draft action Edit;

draft action Activate optimized;

draft action Discard;

 

draft determine action Prepare;

}

 

define behavior for ZI_G_PARENT alias Parent

implementation in class zbp_i_g_Parent unique

persistent table ztg_Parent

draft table ztg_d_Parent

lock dependent by _Root

authorization dependent by _Root

etag master LastLocalUpdateAt

{

update;

delete;

association _Child { create; with draft; } 

association _Root { with draft; }

 

field ( numbering : managed, readonly ) ParentUuid;

field ( readonly ) RootUuid;

 

}

 

 

define behavior for ZI_G_CHILD alias _Child

implementation in class zbp_i_g_child unique

persistent table ztg_Child

draft table ztg_d_Child

lock dependent by _Root

authorization dependent by _Root

etag master LastLocalUpdateAt

{

association _Parent { with draft; }

ancestor association _Root { with draft; }

update;

delete;

field ( readonly ) RootUuid, ParentUuid;

field ( numbering : managed, readonly ) ChildUuid;

}

 

There is another way to create hierarchy using node_id and parent_id with hierarchy and source keywords similar to HANA 2.0 functions, but still eventually the Behavior Definition is important.

Is there a documentation of the same somewhere by SAP?

 

 

I look forward to your response.

 

Best Regards,

Ruchir

entry.title: Re: Field Masking **** in SAP Personas
entry.content: inputType = "Password"

entry.title: Re: F110 Aggregation of open items after editing proposal
entry.content: On your Vendor Master Data we have defined only Payment Method "C" and in the configuration FBZP you are sharing payment method "K". As I could see, you open item also don´t have payment method defined... so it´s a problem. You should have specfied in the Open Item, the Payment Method or in the Vendor Master because the aggregation logic is done as per payment method. In this case, during the proposal run, neither Vendor nor Open Item is setting the proper payment method "K". That will generating a manual task from your users to reallocate this in the proposal.

entry.title: Re: GUI Z Report in Fiori launch pad
entry.content: Hi Ryan-Crosby, Thanks for your reply. Can you share more on Catalog configuration and how to Co-Ordinate with Technical Consultant (ABAP, UI, Security consultant)

entry.title: Re: GUI Z Report in Fiori launch pad
entry.content: @SK24 I cannot give specific steps because our BASIS/Security team takes care of this aspect, but I can confirm that it can be done.

entry.title: /scwm/pi_cc_create Product has not been inventoried before
entry.content:
When we look at a product in Warehouse Management Monitor, it shows as having been completely counted yet when we execute /SCWM/PI_CC/CREATE using explanation mode, the product appears from the selection screen with message 

Product has not been inventoried before

Why would it should up here when in the WMM it says product was already counted?

entry.title: Re: Total Commitment Cost should not reduce after booking...
entry.content: Commitment costs are used in Budget Availability checking so the Commitment costs converts to Actual Cost.  You can run a purchasing report to see all PRs and POs assigned to a project either open or received to get the value you want.

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series]Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding for Your SAP SFSF
entry.content: Great content..much detailed and helpful..thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA-EWM Quantity Classification in outbound process
entry.content:
Hello,

i hope this is still active. I am configuring a quantity classification PICK strategy in S4 EWM. I have 3 classifications, P(PAL), C(CAR) and 1(EA). This used to work until EWM 9.5, but when I tried this in S4 EWM, PAL is working fine, but for CAR, I always get a decimal carton quantity.

For example, the material has the following UOM: 

PAL = 100 EA

CAR = 10 EA

 

Delivery Quantity is 112 EA. Expectation is to split this into the following breakdown:

P = 100 EA (or 1PAL)

C= 10EA (or 1 CAR)

1 = 2 EA

The actual result is:

P = 100 EA (or 1PAL)

C = 12 EA (1.2 CAR)

I wonder why the CAR classification is getting the remaining 12 EA, when it should be getting 10EA only. Is it a standard bug?

Current Configuration

Packspec - I have 3 levels, EA, CAR and PAL. Each level has quantity classification active with condition record for task Creation (0WHT).

Process Type - WPT 2010 is set to rounding rule = 3 (round down to multiples of a unit)

Pick Strategy - I set 3 different search strategy for each classification

When I check the logs of WT creation, it correctly reads the configuration, but the remaining quantity is being assigned to CAR classification even if it has loose quantity intended for other search strategy.

I hope someone can enlighten.

entry.title: After Set TECO status i face error in cost transfer AUC to Fix asset
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Please tell me correct  Settlement Scenario .

1st i Set TECO status , i face error in cost transfer AUC to Fix asset

After remove TECO Status  cost successfully  transfer AUC to fix asset 

Please find Attached Error Screenshot

entry.title: Re: program to find the where used
entry.content:
Using the Transactional Code EWK1.

Example:

Step 1  :  goto -> EWK1 T-code

Step 2 :  type your customized smart-form name (assume that you don't know about corresponding driver program of that smartform) . see the below screen shot for your reference .

Step 3: once you typed relevant customized smart-form name then press find, press enter.

Step 4: it will directly navigate to another window, there you can easily find the relevant driver program for the corresponding smart-forms.

Note: Additionally, you can utilize this T-code to find the locations of FM and other items.

Regards,

Awais Syed

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content: hey

entry.title: How to enable the HU label and Shipping HU label in the Business context (HANDLINGUNIT)?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

when creating custom fields for HUs, these fields are not available in the HU label and HU shipping label. We need some extra info to be printed on the labels.

The field  YY1_ProductPutawayIndi in Business Context: Handling Unit (HANDLINGUNIT) is enabled in multiple forms and the changes have been published.

When downloading the form and verifying it in Adobe LiveCycle designer, the field is only available for the packing list, not for the HU shipping label nor the Handling Unit label.

Should we do some additional actions for the label forms ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to enable the HU label and Shipping HU label in t...
entry.content:
You can create a custom field ‘Product Putaway Indicator’ in the Business Context: Handling Unit (HANDLINGUNIT) and enable it. However, please note that the availability of custom fields in forms depends on the business context of the custom field and the business context of the form.

In your case, the custom field is created in the business context ‘Handling Unit’, but the forms EWM_HU_LABEL and EWM_HU_SHPLABEL might not support this business context, which is why the custom field is not available in these forms.

You can consider creating a custom field with business context - Handling Unit, then determine the logic at /SCWM/EX4_OM_HU_EXTEND_HDR.

This BAdI is used to enhance the standard output of Handling Unit (HU) documents. You can extend the Adobe output forms of handling unit (HU) labels and HU shipping labels according to your business needs.

Please note that implementing this BAdI requires ABAP programming knowledge and should be done internally. Also, any changes should be thoroughly tested in a non-production environment before being transported to the production system.

For further information about this BAdI please check the document below:

Extensibility for Adobe Output Forms of HU Documents 

Hope this helps!

Anything let us know by here.

Best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Is it possible to include validation expressions to "service workflow" steps?
entry.content:
Hi there!

The service workflow defined with our client consists of 5 steps:

  1. Open the activity to view general information,
  2. Travel to the customer,
  3. Capture photos,
  4. Perform the work and fill out the mandatory smarform,
  5. Checkout and close the activity.

service workflow

The problem I am reporting refers to step 1, that is, when the technician opens the activity he "can fill in the smartform". I don't want this to happen, I want the smartform to only be filled in at work execution stage - step 4.

After opening a case in SAP for Me, they told me to go to the screen configuration (activity details on mobile apps) and then change the visibility of smartform card to hidden. I did, but the smartform is always hidden and cannot be filled out.

Is it possible to include a validation expression in advanced settings so that the smartform can only be viewed and edited in the work step?

Thanks in advance for your attention and I'll really appreciate your response. 😉

entry.title: OData - ETag Handling in Batch Processing
entry.content:
In OData implementation for batch processing, a changeset might contain multiple CUD (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE) operations. This can be problematic in combination with eTags because one operation can change data that is about to be processed by consecutive operations. In this case, eTags of these operations might not be valid anymore. You have to redefine the changeset methods and enable defer mode. When using defer mode the automatic eTag check will be done for all operations before any operations have been processed.

Please refer to the below SAP documents for more details on ETag handling in batch processing. 

Reference  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/68bf513362174d54b58cddec28794093/88f15067179140098ee6fc4354f7860d.html?version=7.5.16

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/68bf513362174d54b58cddec28794093/94a126519eff236ee10000000a445394.html?version=7.5.16

#NW ABAP Gateway (OData)  #OData

entry.title: Re: F4 Help in Custom Analytic Query
entry.content: @ankesh_jindal4 The view ZCDS_VH_TEMP needs to have the profit center code as a key field. Otherwise, the association won't work.

entry.title: Public Cloud: fiscalization in Croatia: how to link a charging device to a user
entry.content: In Croatia's fiscalization solution, the fiscal number range is determined by a charging device. The charging device is pulled from the user parameter /CCEE/FISC_CD. At least, this is how it works in an S4H on-premise. There is no possibility to set this user parameter in S4H Public Cloud. How can the charging device be predefined in S4H Public Cloud?

entry.title: Re: Import Goods Movement Goods Issue from excel
entry.content:
Hi Ariel,

Would recommend you provide some more detail about the process you want address. For example, is this manufacturing ? Delivery Management?

Assume you are referring to the legacy app: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/index.html#/detail/Apps('MIGO_GI')/S32

There may be a new Fiori based app or the GI might be embedded in the best practice. For example: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/aff0b3f5f46c42a2b2c0fabfc233bab2/64f81a71edf5490ab522a829be075827.html?locale=en-US

 

If you need to do mass postings, it is typically recommended to investigate the use of an api such as https://api.sap.com/api/API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV/overview

Thank you
Jerry

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am excited to apply for the digital skills initiative program, which aligns with my career goals and passion for process automation. 
 
As a Planner EAM responsible for maintaining master data in SAP PM, I recognize the importance of upskilling to remain relevant in the industry. This program offers a unique opportunity to enhance my skills in automation, enabling me to drive efficiency and innovation in my current role.
 
Moreover, it will expand my career prospects and open up new avenues for growth. I am eager to be part of this program and leverage the skills and knowledge gained to make a meaningful impact in my organization and the industry.
 
Regards 
Mitch

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning
entry.content: Bannu - With the SAP leaning you will get lot of resources and SAP Learning Hub is a digital learning solution that supports learners in building and maintaining SAP software skills. It provides guided, expert-led, and hands-on learning opportunities to enable up skilling across the SAP solution portfolio. In case of Ariba you can still try to create free account to explore the functionality though it will be limited but you will be able to get some hands on.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 
I am excited to apply for the digital skills initiative program, which aligns with my career goals and passion for process automation. 
 
As a Planner EAM responsible for maintaining master data in SAP PM, I recognize the importance of upskilling to remain relevant in the industry. This program offers a unique opportunity to enhance my skills in automation, enabling me to drive efficiency and innovation in my current role.
 
Moreover, it will expand my career prospects and open up new avenues for growth. I am eager to be part of this program and leverage the skills and knowledge gained to make a meaningful impact in my organization and the industry.
 
Regards 
Mitch

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Email Search email activity stops working intermittently
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am new to Build process Automation and working on building the BOT which reads emails from one folder in outlook in unattended mode. It works well when i deploy the project however after some time it stops working. BOT keep on running but it does not find any email in search email activity.

Can you please suggest what can be the reason or where can I find the reason of this behavior? 

Thanks and Regards,

AP

entry.title: Re: How to implement Value-Help in Input-Field for RAP OD...

Your understanding about RAP is completely off.

just check a few example.

value help can be done easily by using cds + annotation.
